On 10/06/2026 23:14 AEST, unauthorised access to payroll SFTP was detected via compromised contractor creds (E m p - 7 3 1 9, “J. Lougheed”), source IP 203.0.113.45.
Data at risk: names, work emails, and b s b / a c c numbers for approx 1,208 staff/contractors; no Medicare, TFNs, health details, or credit card data present in this system.
Preliminary financial impact estimate: A$2.8m cashflow timing variance, up to 3.1% effect on FY25 EBITDA if payroll reruns occur; cyber insurance excess A$250k.
We executed the Incident Runbook v4.2 and notified EmberBank Custody Pty Ltd (payroll escrow); external disclosure to ASX/ASIC remains embargoed until QUOLL milestones are met.
Related transaction: a binding term sheet for acquisition of Kestrel Logistics Group Pty Ltd’s Pilbarra fleet by NovaRange (signed 09/06/2026) includes a MAC/MAE clause at cl 9.4; no material adverse change has occurred.
For clarity, this operational event is not expected to trigger a M A E and is not reasonably likely to reduce consolidated revenue by >5% or breach debt covenants.
